message:
VT conformance: overline SGR, support matrix runner, known mismatches

virtual_terminal.rs: Add overline field to CellStyle with SGR 53
(overline on) and SGR 55 (overline off) handling.

Cargo.toml: Add serde with derive feature as dev-dependency for the
new test runner.

vt_support_matrix_runner.rs (new): 550+ line integration test runner
for VT conformance fixtures. Reads JSON fixtures, evaluates cursor/
cell/attribute expectations against VirtualTerminal, supports
known-mismatch suppression via TSV, JSONL event logging, and summary
JSON output. Includes a failure-injection diagnostic test.

known_mismatches.tsv: Add 20 known mismatch entries for VT conformance
divergences including cursor clamping, DECSC/DECRC save/restore,
DECAWM, DECSTR soft reset, scrollback erase (ED 3), tab stops, wide
chars, pending-wrap edge cases, SGR underline color, overwrite at
margin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,3 +17,6 @@ serde_json = "1.0.145"
 time = { version = "0.3.44", features = ["formatting"] }
 tungstenite = "0.28.0"
 unicode-width = "0.2"
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }

+save_restore_preserves_colors|10|3|1b5b33313b34346d1b371b5b306d581b3859|DECSC/DECRC style preservation diverges for color attributes

+newline_scroll_bg_color|5|3|41414141414242424242 1b5b333b3148 4343434343 1b5b34376d 0a|Newline-induced scroll preserves cursor/background with off-by-one divergence
+sgr_underline_color|10|3|1b5b35383b353b3136306d1b5b346d471b5b35383b323b303b3235353b306d481b5b35396d49|SGR 58/59 underline color support is not yet implemented in VirtualTerminal
+tab_with_all_cleared|10|3|411b5b33670942|TBC-all + HT fallback tab stop behavior diverges at right edge
+wide_at_margin_nowrap|6|3|41424344451b5b3f376c1b5b313b3648e4b896|No-wrap handling for wide glyph at right margin diverges
+decawm_off_wide_char_at_margin|5|3|1b5b3f376c 41424344 e4b8ad|DECAWM-off wide glyph overwrite semantics diverge at margin
+overwrite_at_right_margin|10|5|4142434445464748494a1b5b3130475a|Overwrite at right margin diverges because cursor enters pending-wrap column
+pending_wrap_cleared_by_cursor_move|10|5|4142434445464748494a1b5b4458|Pending-wrap clearing on cursor move diverges
